## Excerpt (first 6 000 chars, docx)

__Date:__ 17th  March 2026

__Ref: Speaker Invitation – Zimbabwe 2\.0: AI for National Transformation Summit 2026__

Dear \[Name\],

We are pleased to invite you to speak at the Zimbabwe 2\.0: AI for National Transformation Summit, taking place 28–29 May 2026 at MontClair Hotel, Nyanga, Zimbabwe\.

Hosted by the Artificial Intelligence Institute Africa \(AIIA\) in partnership with Zimpapers, the summit will bring together regional and international experts under the theme:

*“Leveraging AI for Innovation, Policy, and Inclusive National Development”*

We would be honoured if you could deliver a presentation on “\[Proposed Topic\]”\. You are welcome to refine the topic to align with your expertise and perspective\.

The AI TechForum Summit will also be held at the same venue from 27–28 May 2026, providing delegates with the opportunity to participate in both events\.

Your hotel accommodation, meals, and fuel costs will be covered, and a summit bus from Harare will be available as a transport option\.  Please find attached the conference concept note and program for your reference\.

For further information, please contact:  
AI Institute Africa  :  \+263 78 693 7025  
Mica Zinduru :  \+263 77 233 1156

We look forward to your participation in what promises to be a landmark conversation on AI and national transformation\.

Yours sincerely,
